Setup guide

Add AI Chat to your website

Select your website platform below and follow the step-by-step instructions to get your AI Chat widget live.

Select your platform

Wix
WordPress
Squarespace
GoDaddy
↑ Choose your platform to see the installation steps

Installing on Wix

5 steps · ~3 minutes

1
Sign in to your Wix account and open your site dashboard.
2
From the menu bar, select Settings and make sure you're on the Overview page.
3
Scroll down and click Settings, then scroll to Development & Integrations and click Custom Code.
4
In the Custom Code pop-up, configure the following:
  • Paste your DearDoc code into the snippet box
  • Select your domain under Select domain
  • Set the name to DearDoc Code
  • Choose All Pages and set it to Load code on each new page
5
Click Apply to save, then visit your website to confirm the AI Chat widget is live.
💡 The widget will appear on all pages automatically once the code is applied.

Installing on WordPress

6 steps · ~5 minutes

1
Sign in to your WordPress admin panel.
2
Check if Code Snippets appears in your left sidebar menu. If it does, skip to step 5.
If not, continue to step 3 to install the plugin
3
Go to Plugins → Add New.
In the search bar, type WPCode.
Find the plugin made by WPCode.
4
Click Install Now, then Activate.
Once activated, Code Snippets will appear in your sidebar.
5
Hover over Code Snippets and click Header & Footer from the sub-menu.
6
Paste your DearDoc code into the Header section.
Click Save Changes, then publish your site.
💡 Once saved, the AI Chat will appear on every page of your site automatically.

Installing on Squarespace

5 steps · ~2 minutes

1
Sign in to Squarespace and select the website you want to edit.
2
In the menu bar, click Pages.
3
Scroll down and click Website Tools.
4
Click Code Injection.
5
Paste your DearDoc AI Chat code into the Header box and click Save.
💡 No need to republish — saving Code Injection applies changes to all pages immediately.

Installing on GoDaddy

6 steps · ~5 minutes

1
Sign in to GoDaddy and select the website you want to edit.
2
Click Edit Website to open the site builder.
3
Scroll to the bottom of a page and click Add Section.
4
From the menu on the right, select HTML.
5
Paste your DearDoc code into the Custom Code box and set Forced Height to 1.
6
Repeat steps 3–5 for every page on your site — GoDaddy requires the script to be added to each page individually.⚠ Important — do not skip this step
💡 GoDaddy doesn't support global header injection, so the script must be added per page.
